creator: hubert.tournier@gmail.com
text:
Hello Nuno,

It's apparently a new behaviour of setuptools / build since beginning of April to replace hyphens in names with underscores (I think it can impact many Python ports).

I made version 1.4.2 peculiarly for working around this but didn't notice the new naming was also included inside the tarball.

Let's cancel this update, I'll make a new version fixing this...
